title: Lavish
description: Aesthetic blocks that help spice up your world!
body:
Join the [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/xHRwb8mPKB)! 


Lavish is a mod that adds blocks to help spice up your world. The Aesthetic blocks from my other mods will be brought into this project as well.



Big thank you to [Stellari](https://modrinth.com/user/Stellari) and [Yirmiri](https://modrinth.com/user/Yirmiri) for designing the blocks brought in from my other mod!



Blocks by Stellari:

- Amethyst Bricks (and the set)
- Eye Chiseled Amethyst Bricks


Blocks by Yirmiri:

- Amethyst Lantern
- Stone Pillar
- Cobbled Calcite
